ExportScreen.backup.title: Full Backup (JSON)

ExportScreen.footer.hintCvv: CSV is for viewing/analysis in Excel/Sheets.
ExportScreen.footer.hintJson: The backup (JSON) is intended for restoring data
FaqScreen.itemAnswer1: All your data is stored locally on your device. Moneyra does not use external servers — your information never leaves your phone. iCloud backups are automatically created to keep your data safe.
FaqScreen.itemAnswer2: Yes. If iCloud backup is enabled, your data will automatically be restored after reinstalling the app or setting up a new device with the same iCloud account.
FaqScreen.itemAnswer3: Absolutely. All data stays on your device and iCloud account. We never collect, analyze, or share your financial information with anyone.
FaqScreen.itemAnswer4: Yes. If iCloud sync is enabled, your data will automatically stay up to date across all your Apple devices that use the same iCloud account.
FaqScreen.itemAnswer5: If you experience any issues, try restarting the app or restoring your latest iCloud backup. You can also contact our support — we're always happy to help.
FaqScreen.itemAnswer6: Yes. Moneyra is fully offline-first — you can view and edit your data anytime, even without an internet connection.
FaqScreen.itemQuestion2: 2. Can I restore my data if I reinstall the app?
FaqScreen.itemQuestion4: 4. Can I use Moneyra on multiple devices?
ImportScreen.description: Restore your data from a JSON backup created by this app on the Export screen.
